releaseNotes: 修复 Dock 图标尺寸与圆角；为全部 39 套 WorkBuddy 皮肤补齐合规的输入框悬浮主体，并同时覆盖新任务与历史任务；新增“最新”前 6 套皮肤、页面缓存与启动主窗口，修正本机服务状态恢复和未验证客户端发行门禁。
releaseNotesEn: Fixes Dock icon sizing and rounding; adds validated composer mascots to all 39 WorkBuddy skins across new and historical tasks; adds a six-item Latest shelf, cached tabs, a visible launch window, recovered local-service status, and stricter release trust gates.
